prompt: Here's our current job ad — can you improve it? 'We're looking for a rockstar DevOps ninja to join our young and energetic team. Must have 10+ years Docker experience, 7+ years Kubernetes, Computer Science degree required. We offer competitive salary. Must thrive in fast-paced environment and crush it daily. Culture fit is essential.'
assertions: Removes 'rockstar', 'ninja' and replaces with descriptive professional language
Replaces '10+ years Docker' and '7+ years Kubernetes' with skill proficiency descriptions
Flags 'competitive salary' and either replaces with a range or explicitly states salary range should be added
Replaces 'culture fit' with specific behaviours or ways of working
Adds equal opportunities statement and reasonable adjustments offer
Includes an INCLUSIVE LANGUAGE CHECK section documenting what was changed and why
